section.heading: Air National Guard of the United States: composition
section.chapeau: The Air National Guard of the United States is the reserve component of the Air Force that consists of—

paragraph.content: federally recognized units and organizations of the Air National Guard; and
members of the Air National Guard who are also Reserves of the Air Force.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI, § 1661(a)(1), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 2971.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 8077 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 1, 1994, except as otherwise provided, see section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337, set out as a note under section 10001 of this title.
